top_signals.title: OpenAI announces new Guaranteed Capacity offering for customers to secure compute
top_signals.summary: Altman said OpenAI will make sure it leaves enough capacity available for its products like ChatGPT and its coding assistant Codex.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
